demo.title: alchemy-agent.ts

setup: Sign up at dashboard.alchemy.com and create an app to get an API key
Set `ALCHEMY_API_KEY` env var for direct API key auth
For x402 flow: install `@x402/fetch` + `@x402/evm`, set `EVM_PRIVATE_KEY` with ETH for payment
Prefer Bankr wallet signing (`/agent/sign`) over raw private key when using x402
For MPP gateway: set `MPP_GATEWAY_URL` and configure metered proxy credentials
